title: Create automation for sub-item to change status on main item
excerpt: I’m trying to create a board for User Acceptance Testing on an ERP implementation, some of our Test scenarios have sub-items.  If one of those sub-items fails, we need the main item to change Status/Severity column on ma…

posts.author: shawn.yarnold (Shawn Yarnold)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to create a board for User Acceptance Testing on an ERP implementation, some of our Test scenarios have sub-items. If one of those sub-items fails, we need the main item to change Status/Severity column on main item.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@shawn.yarnold

You can do that using a custom automation:

image934×371 20.7 KB

The first status can be a subitem status and the second a main item status.

posts.author: shawn.yarnold (Shawn Yarnold)
posts.cookedHtml: @JCorrell Thanks!!! Can I report on sub-items? We have a board for UAT Testing for ERP Implementation structured with main item and various sub items of the main test item, but want to see all items in a report not just the main item.
